hypothesis: Integrating a persistent, graph-structured semantic memory that encodes force-field parameter ontologies with unit/provenance constraints and canonical RASPA configuration templates will increase the parameter-extraction IoU for non-standard table layouts (e.g., EPM2) from 0.67 to ≥0.90 and raise single-adsorbate HOA setup success from 80% to ≥95% on a held-out benchmark of at least 20 papers and 50 automated simulations, relative to the current system.
